translationNote: Translated from the reviewed Traditional Chinese FAQ. AI translation, not manually reviewed.

items.question: Will there be crowd control at the exhibition?
items.answer: Staff will manage visitor flow according to on-site conditions and admit visitors based on the number of people inside. Please follow staff instructions for entry and queueing.

items.question: About how many people can enter at one time?
items.answer: The venue can hold around 15 people. The actual number admitted may still be adjusted based on on-site conditions.

items.question: Around what time will queue organization begin?
items.answer: During the event, queue organization will begin at the venue entrance at 10:30 each day. Number tickets may be distributed depending on the number of people on-site.

items.question: Do I need to get a number ticket or queue slip to enter?
items.answer: Number tickets may be distributed depending on the number of people inside and outside the venue. Please follow the instructions of on-site staff.
aliases: Do I need to get a number ticket / queue slip to enter?

items.question: Can I queue overnight?
items.answer: Please do not queue overnight, to avoid disturbing nearby residents and on-site order.
aliases: Can I queue overnight?

items.question: Is there a latest entry time?
items.answer: There is currently no special latest entry time, but please note that daily opening hours are 11:00 - 18:00.

items.question: Is there a time limit after entering?
items.answer: If the venue is crowded, visit time may be limited to 30 minutes. When there are fewer visitors, there may be no time limit. Please follow on-site staff instructions.

items.question: Can I eat, drink, or bring beverages inside?
items.answer: Food and non-bottled beverages are not allowed to be brought into the venue for eating or drinking.
aliases: Is eating or drinking allowed inside?
Can I bring beverages into the venue?

items.question: Can I bring pets into the venue?
items.answer: All pets other than a living Godzilla are prohibited from entering the venue.
aliases: Can I bring pets into the venue?

items.question: Should I avoid bringing large bags?
items.answer: Traveling light is recommended. If you purchase many goods, only black plastic bags will be available for add-on purchase on-site. Visitors who need one may bring a large bag themselves.
aliases: Is it recommended to avoid bringing large bags?

items.question: Will bags be provided on-site?
items.answer: Black plastic bags will be available for add-on purchase on-site.
aliases: Will bags be provided for goods?

items.question: Will there be measures to prevent collisions, theft, or blocked walkways?
items.answer: Exhibits will be protected with warning lines or acrylic frames. Please do not touch the works, and keep the distance indicated by on-site signage.
aliases: Will there be measures to prevent collisions, theft, or blocked walkways?
Will artworks have warning areas or safe distances?

items.question: How far should I stand from the artworks?
items.answer: Please keep the distance indicated by warning lines and on-site signage.

items.question: Will there be clear route guidance on-site?
items.answer: Routes will be arranged on-site. Please follow staff instructions.

items.question: Can I feed the staff?
items.answer: Please do not trouble the staff, and please do not affect on-site operations or visitor order.
aliases: Can I feed the staff?

items.question: Can I take photos on-site?
items.answer: Yes, please take as many photos as you can! You can use the event hashtags #友善蝕光 #蝕光畫展 to share on social media and let Aoi see them!
aliases: Is photography allowed on-site?

items.question: Can I record video or use a tripod on-site?
items.answer: Video recording and tripods are allowed, but please do not affect other visitors' movement routes or viewing rights.
aliases: Can I record video on-site? Can I bring a tripod?

items.question: Can I livestream on-site?
items.answer: To protect everyone's viewing experience, livestreaming inside the venue is prohibited.
aliases: Is livestreaming allowed on-site?

items.question: Can I use flash when taking photos?
items.answer: Flash photography is prohibited inside the venue.
aliases: Can I use flash when taking photos?

items.question: Will there be artwork description cards on-site?
items.answer: Detailed information will be provided for all exhibits.
aliases: Will there be artwork description cards at the exhibition?

items.question: Will the description cards include illustrator and artwork information?
items.answer: The exhibit descriptions will include the illustrator, artwork information, and other related details.
aliases: Will the description cards include illustrator, artwork information, and related details?

items.question: Will the gallery area and goods purchase area be separated?
items.answer: They are all within the same event venue. Please follow on-site signage and staff instructions for where to stand or queue.
aliases: Will the gallery area and goods purchase area be separated?
Will the purchase area, pre-order area, and artwork viewing area be separated?

items.question: If I want to buy an artwork, do I need to register at the counter first?
items.answer: If you wish to purchase an artwork, you may first register at the counter. Artwork purchases are checked out separately from other goods.
aliases: If I want to buy an artwork, do I need to register at the counter right away?

items.question: What is the artwork purchase process?
items.answer: Please register with staff, make payment, and pick up the artwork in person at the venue at 18:00 on 6/14 (Sun). If you cannot pick it up yourself, you may ask staff for shipping assistance.

items.question: After buying an artwork, do I take it home on-site, or pick it up / have it shipped after the exhibition ends?
items.answer: Please pick it up in person at the venue at 18:00 on 6/14 (Sun). If you cannot pick it up yourself, you may ask staff for shipping assistance.
aliases: If someone buys an artwork, do they take it home on-site, or pick it up / have it shipped after the exhibition ends?

items.question: If multiple people want to buy the same artwork, will bidding be used?
items.answer: Artwork sales for this exhibition will not use any form of bidding. They will be sold on a first-come, first-served basis.
aliases: If many people want to buy the same artwork, will there be bidding?
Will artworks be sold by bidding?
Are artwork purchases first-come, first-served?

items.question: What payment methods are accepted for on-site goods?
items.answer: On-site payment supports cash, LINE Pay, Apple Pay, credit cards, and bank transfer. Whether overseas credit cards can be used depends on the on-site card terminal and the bank authorization result.
aliases: What payment methods are available for goods?
Can I use a credit card? What about an overseas credit card?
Can I use LINE Pay?

items.question: Do I fill out an order form to buy goods, or pay directly at the counter?
items.answer: For on-site goods, please check out at the counter. For pre-order items, please fill out the pre-order form and complete the order according to the on-site or pre-order system process.
aliases: Do I fill out an order form to buy goods, or take the items directly to the counter for checkout?

items.question: Are regular goods purchase-limited?
items.answer: Purchase limits apply during the first three days of the exhibition. For purchase-limited items, please refer to the image markings in the merchandise section. The remaining days will have no limit.
aliases: Are regular goods purchase-limited?

items.question: Can I proxy-buy for someone?
items.answer: Proxy buying itself is not restricted. However, during the first three days of the exhibition, if you purchase more than 3 of the same item, please show proof of proxy purchase and follow the judgment of on-site staff.
aliases: Are visitors allowed to proxy-buy for others?

items.question: After placing a pre-order on-site, will I receive a paper receipt or an online order?
items.answer: Pre-orders are placed through the Abyss anime merchandise website system, and the order will be retained in the website system.

items.question: Can I cancel, return, or exchange pre-order items after payment?
items.answer: All sales are final after purchase and cannot be returned, exchanged, or canceled. Please confirm the items, quantities, and recipient information again before pre-ordering and paying.
aliases: Can pre-order items be canceled, returned, or exchanged after payment is completed?

items.question: Will pre-order items be picked up on-site later, or shipped?
items.answer: Pre-order items will be shipped according to the information on the pre-order form. Please make sure the recipient information on the form is correct.
aliases: Will pre-order items be picked up on-site later, or shipped?

items.question: Will production and shipping timing for pre-order items be announced separately?
items.answer: Production and shipping timing for pre-order items will be announced on Aoi's X (formerly Twitter). Please watch for future social media updates.
aliases: Will production and shipping timing for pre-order items be announced separately?

items.question: Will there be an offering box or personal LINE Pay on-site?
items.answer:
This event is handled by the co-organizer. To avoid tax and accounting responsibility issues, there will be no offering box on-site, and no additional personal LINE Pay will be provided.
(However, you can donate to Aoi now through DeerDonate or the LINE PAY below.)
(Regenerated using AI. Thanks, AI!)
On mobile, you can directly tap here to donate with LINE PAY.
aliases: Where will the offering box and LINE PAY be placed?

items.question: If someone causes trouble, makes a scene, or damages things on-site, will they be penalized?
items.answer:
To protect all visitors' experience and maintain on-site order, the organizer will call the police directly for any malicious disruption or destructive behavior. There will be no leniency.
If any artwork in the venue is damaged, the person responsible will be required to compensate 10 times the original price!
Please help create a good viewing environment together!
aliases: How will damage to artworks or troublemaking on-site be handled?

items.question: If crowd control requires queueing, will there be shade or rain cover?
items.answer: The waiting area outside the venue is under an arcade, providing basic protection from wind, rain, and sun. Please do not worry.

items.question: If the exhibition is successful, is there a chance of additional central or southern Taiwan sessions in the future?
items.answer: This exhibition is currently planned as a single session only, with no plans for additional central or southern Taiwan sessions. Please make the most of this opportunity to visit!
